introSection: Exterminator is an enclosed steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride was manufactured by French company Reverchon with theming and logo design by American company R&R Creative Amusement Designs. It is heavily themed around the concept of the rider as a rat attempting to escape from Kennywood exterminators. The cars face forwards for the first half of the ride, but spin freely throughout the second half.
fullText:
Exterminator is an enclosed steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride was manufactured by French company Reverchon with theming and logo design by American company R&R Creative Amusement Designs. It is heavily themed around the concept of the rider as a rat attempting to escape from Kennywood exterminators. The cars face forwards for the first half of the ride, but spin freely throughout the second half.

Exterminator opened on April 18, 1999.



Black track and supports.
